%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, when, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format, to_date
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, sum, regexp_replace

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Gold_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
print(SynapseDedicatedServer)
print(TempFolder)
print(SynapseDedicatedDatabase)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_gold =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_gold:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
# Table FactBillableUsage_5min: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="FactBillableUsage_5min"
source_dbname = "aemo_silver"
source_tablename = "nem12_silver"
source_dbname_lf = "silver"
source_tablename_lf = "loss_factors"
source_tablename_nmilf = "nmi_loss_factor"
source_tablename_nmirel = "nmi_nmi_relationship"
source_tablename_nmirole = "nmi"

# Load 30, 15 and 5 min data into separate data frame
df_gold_30 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msatslf.TNI, 
                                        msatslf.DLFCode, 
                                        msatslf.Status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.NMI, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msatslf.SequenceNumber DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmilf} msatslf
                                        ON aemo.NMI = msatslf.NMI
                                           AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msatslf.ValidFrom_D AS DATE) AND CAST(msatslf.ValidTo_D AS DATE)
                                           AND msatslf.RowStatus = 'A' AND msatslf.ParticipantId = 'CLEANCOR'                                            
                                    where aemo.IntervalLength = 30
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1
                    """)

df_gold_15 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msatslf.TNI, 
                                        msatslf.DLFCode, 
                                        msatslf.Status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.NMI, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msatslf.SequenceNumber DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmilf} msatslf
                                        ON aemo.NMI = msatslf.NMI 
                                           AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msatslf.ValidFrom_D AS DATE) AND CAST(msatslf.ValidTo_D AS DATE)
                                           AND msatslf.RowStatus = 'A' AND msatslf.ParticipantId = 'CLEANCOR'
                                    where aemo.IntervalLength = 15
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1
                    """)

df_gold_5 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msatslf.TNI, 
                                        msatslf.DLFCode, 
                                        msatslf.Status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.NMI, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msatslf.SequenceNumber DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmilf} msatslf
                                        ON aemo.NMI = msatslf.NMI 
                                           AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msatslf.ValidFrom_D AS DATE) AND CAST(msatslf.ValidTo_D AS DATE)
                                           AND msatslf.RowStatus = 'A' AND msatslf.ParticipantId = 'CLEANCOR'
                                    where aemo.IntervalLength = 5
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# Initialize Spark session
spark = SparkSession.builder.master("local").appName("Add Index Starting from 1").getOrCreate()

# Define start and end times
start_time = datetime(2025, 1, 1, 0, 0)  # 2025-01-01 00:00:00
end_time = datetime(2025, 1, 1, 23, 55)    # 2025-01-01 01:00:00

# Generate time intervals with 5 minutes increment
time_intervals = []
current_time = start_time
while current_time <= end_time:
    time_intervals.append(current_time)
    current_time += timedelta(minutes=5)

# Convert the list of time intervals into a PySpark DataFrame
time_df = spark.createDataFrame([(t,) for t in time_intervals], ['time'])

# Define a window specification to generate row numbers
window_spec = Window.orderBy("time")

# Add the index column starting from 1
time_df_with_index = time_df.withColumn("new_IntervalIndex", row_number().over(window_spec))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("new_TimeId",date_format("time", 'HHmm').cast("integer"))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("new_IntervalLength",lit(5))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("TimeHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "new_TimeId"), 256))

# Show the result
#display(time_df_with_index)

# Generate an array of times with 5-minute increments for each row
df_with_30 = df_gold_30.withColumn(
    'times_array', 
    array(
        col('Timestamp'),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 20 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 25 MINUTE")
    )
)

df_with_15 = df_gold_15.withColumn(
    'times_array', 
    array(
        col('Timestamp'),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE")
    )
)

#display(df_with_30)
#display(df_with_15)

# Explode the array into 5 rows per original row for 30min
expanded_df_30 = df_with_30.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'DLFCode','TNI','Status', explode('times_array').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage')/6)
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

# Explode the array into 5 rows per original row for 15min
expanded_df_15 = df_with_15.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'DLFCode','TNI','Status', explode('times_array').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage')/3)
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

# 5min data 
expanded_df_5 = df_gold_5.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                  'DLFCode','TNI','Status',col('Timestamp').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

#display(expanded_df_30)

# Perform the union
df_union = expanded_df_15.union(expanded_df_30)
df_union = df_union.union(expanded_df_5)

#display(df_union)

# Pivot the 'Suffix' column into separate columns, aggregating by 'Usage'
expanded_df = df_union.groupBy('NMI','NMIHashId','new_time','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','new_TimeId'
                                ,'DLFCode','TNI','Status').pivot('Suffix').agg(sum('new_Usage'))

# Join for IntervalIndex
expanded_df = expanded_df.join(time_df_with_index, on='new_TimeId', how='inner')

# Replace NULL values in usage
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'E':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'B':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'K':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'Q':0})


# Calculated fields
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('Net_kWh', col('E')-col('B'))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('Net_MWh', (col('E')-col('B'))/1000)
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kW', ((col('E')*6)*2))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kVAR', ((col('Q')*6)*2))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kVA', sqrt(pow(col('kW'),2)+pow(col('kVAR'),2)))

expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn(
    'Power_Factor', 
    when(col('kVA') == 0, 0)
    .when(col('kW') == 0, 0)
    .otherwise(col('kW')/col('kVA'))
)


# Add columns
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('end_time', expr("new_time + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('DateId',date_format(col('new_time'), 'yyyyMMdd').cast("integer"))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('DateHashId', sha2(concat_ws("||", "DateId"), 256))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('Date',to_date('new_time'))

# Show the result
#display(expanded_df)

# Select required column
expanded_df_final = expanded_df.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','Date',col('new_time').alias('Timestamp'),'DateHashId',col('end_time').alias('DisplayTimestamp_d'),'TimeHashId',
                                    col('new_IntervalIndex').alias('Period'),'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','DLFCode',col('TNI').alias('TLFCode'),'Status',
                                    'E','B','K','Q','Net_kWh','Net_MWh','kW','kVAR','kVA','Power_Factor')

# Show the result
#display(expanded_df_final)

# Load DLF and TLF values into separate data frame
df_dlf_tlf = spark.sql(f"""
                WITH RankedRows AS (
                    SELECT *, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY LossFactorCode, FromDate, RegionId ORDER BY VersionNo desc) AS rn
                    FROM {source_dbname_lf}.{source_tablename_lf}
                    )
                    SELECT  LossFactorCode,
                            LossFactorValue,
                            FromDate,
                            ToDate,
                            RecordSourceTableName                       
                    FROM RankedRows
                    WHERE rn = 1
df_dlf_tlf = df_dlf_tlf.na.fill({'LossFactorValue':1})

# Join for DLF Value
df_dlf_usage = expanded_df_final.join(
    df_dlf_tlf.filter(col("RecordSourceTableName") == "distributionlossfactor"), 
    [(col('DLFCode') ==  col('LossFactorCode')) & (col("Date").between(col("FromDate"),col("ToDate")))],
    'left'

df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_Net_kWh',col('Net_kWh')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_Net_MWh',col('Net_MWh')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_kW',col('kW')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_kVAR',col('kVAR')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_kVA',col('kVA')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn('DLFUsage_Power_Factor',col('Power_Factor')*col('LossFactorValue'))

df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.select('NMI','Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'DLFCode','TLFCode','Status',col('LossFactorValue').alias('DLFValue'),'E','B','K','Q','Net_kWh','DLFUsage_Net_kWh',
                                    'Net_MWh','DLFUsage_Net_MWh','kW','DLFUsage_kW','kVAR','DLFUsage_kVAR','kVA','DLFUsage_kVA','Power_Factor','DLFUsage_Power_Factor')

# Join for TLF Value
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.join(
    df_dlf_tlf.filter(col("RecordSourceTableName") == "transmissionlossfactor"), 
    [(col('TLFCode') == col('LossFactorCode')) & (col("Date").between(col("FromDate"),col("ToDate")))],
    'left'

df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn("DLFTLFUsage_Net_kWh",col('DLFUsage_Net_kWh')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn("DLFTLFUsage_Net_MWh",col('DLFUsage_Net_MWh')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn("DLFTLFUsage_kW",col('DLFUsage_kW')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn('DLFTLFUsage_kVAR',col('DLFUsage_kVAR')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn('DLFTLFUsage_kVA',col('DLFUsage_kVA')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn('DLFTLFUsage_Power_Factor',col('DLFUsage_Power_Factor')*col('LossFactorValue'))

df_lf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.select('NMI','Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','Status',col('LossFactorValue').alias('TLFValue'),'E','B','K','Q','Net_kWh','DLFTLFUsage_Net_kWh',
                                    'Net_MWh','DLFTLFUsage_Net_MWh','kW','DLFTLFUsage_kW','kVAR','DLFTLFUsage_kVAR','kVA','DLFTLFUsage_kVA','Power_Factor','DLFTLFUsage_Power_Factor')

# Load NMI Role data into separate data frame
df_nmi_role = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT 
        NMI AS RoleNMI,
        NMIRole,
        CAST(ValidFrom_D AS date) RoleValidFromDate,
        CAST(ValidTo_D AS date) RoleValidToDate   
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmirole}
    WHERE Party in ('CLEANCO', 'CLEANCOR') and RowStatus = 'A'

# Filter LR role and get the respective child NMIs
df_lr = df_lf_usage.join(
    df_nmi_role.filter(col("NMIRole") == "LR"),
    [(df_lf_usage.NMI == df_nmi_role.RoleNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RoleValidFromDate"),col("RoleValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# Load nmi_nmi_relationship data into separate data frame
df_nmi_rel = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT 
        NMI AS ChildNMI,
        ParentNMI,
        CAST(ValidFrom_D AS date) RelValidFromDate,
        CAST(ValidTo_D AS date) RelValidToDate,
        ENID      
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmirel}
    WHERE RowStatus = 'A'

# Get the parent NMI for the child NMIs with LR role
df_child_lr = df_lr.join(
    df_nmi_rel,
    [(df_lr.NMI == df_nmi_rel.ChildNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RelValidFromDate"),col("RelValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# add usage for the Date, ParentNMI combination
df_child_lr_usage = df_child_lr.groupBy('Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                        'ParentNMI','DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status').agg(
                                    sum('E').alias('E_sum'),
                                    sum('B').alias('B_sum'),
                                    sum('K').alias('K_sum'),
                                    sum('Q').alias('Q_sum'),
                                    sum('Net_kWh').alias('prelf_Net_kWh'),                                   
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Net_kWh').alias('postlf_Net_kWh'),
                                    sum('Net_MWh').alias('prelf_Net_MWh'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Net_MWh').alias('postlf_Net_MWh'),
                                    sum('kW').alias('prelf_kW'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kW').alias('postlf_kW'),
                                    sum('kVAR').alias('prelf_kVAR'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kVAR').alias('postlf_kVAR'),
                                    sum('kVA').alias('prelf_kVA'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kVA').alias('postlf_kVA'),
                                    sum('Power_Factor').alias('prelf_Power_Factor'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Power_Factor').alias('postlf_Power_Factor')

df_child_lr_usage = df_child_lr_usage.select('Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',col('ParentNMI').alias('NMI'),
                                             'DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status','E_sum','B_sum','K_sum','Q_sum','prelf_Net_kWh','postlf_Net_kWh','prelf_Net_MWh','postlf_Net_MWh',
                                             'prelf_kW','postlf_kW','prelf_kVAR','postlf_kVAR','prelf_kVA','postlf_kVA','prelf_Power_Factor','postlf_Power_Factor',lit('childusage').alias('role'))

# Filter FRMP role and get the respective NMIs
df_frmp = df_lf_usage.join(
    df_nmi_role.filter(col("NMIRole") == "FRMP"),
    [(df_lf_usage.NMI == df_nmi_role.RoleNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RoleValidFromDate"),col("RoleValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# add usage for the Date and NMI combination
df_frmp_usage = df_frmp.groupBy('Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','NMI',
                                    'DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status').agg(
                                    sum('E').alias('E_sum'),
                                    sum('B').alias('B_sum'),
                                    sum('K').alias('K_sum'),
                                    sum('Q').alias('Q_sum'),
                                    sum('Net_kWh').alias('prelf_Net_kWh'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Net_kWh').alias('postlf_Net_kWh'),
                                    sum('Net_MWh').alias('prelf_Net_MWh'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Net_MWh').alias('postlf_Net_MWh'),
                                    sum('kW').alias('prelf_kW'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kW').alias('postlf_kW'),
                                    sum('kVAR').alias('prelf_kVAR'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kVAR').alias('postlf_kVAR'),
                                    sum('kVA').alias('prelf_kVA'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_kVA').alias('postlf_kVA'),
                                    sum('Power_Factor').alias('prelf_Power_Factor'),
                                    sum('DLFTLFUsage_Power_Factor').alias('postlf_Power_Factor')

df_frmp_usage = df_frmp_usage.select('Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','NMI',
                                             'DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status','E_sum','B_sum','K_sum','Q_sum','prelf_Net_kWh','postlf_Net_kWh',
                                             'prelf_Net_MWh','postlf_Net_MWh','prelf_kW','postlf_kW','prelf_kVAR','postlf_kVAR',
                                             'prelf_kVA','postlf_kVA','prelf_Power_Factor','postlf_Power_Factor',lit('parentusage').alias('role'))

# Perform the union
df_usage_union = df_frmp_usage.union(df_child_lr_usage) 

# Pivot the 'role' column into separate columns, aggregating by pre and post lossfactor usage
df_usage = df_usage_union.groupBy('Date','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','NMI',
                                  'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status').pivot("role").agg(
                                            sum('E_sum').alias('fianl_E_sum'),
                                            sum('B_sum').alias('fianl_B_sum'),
                                            sum('K_sum').alias('fianl_K_sum'),
                                            sum('Q_sum').alias('fianl_Q_sum'),
                                            sum('prelf_Net_kWh').alias('sum_prelf_Net_kWh'),
                                            sum('postlf_Net_kWh').alias('sum_postlf_Net_kWh'),
                                            sum('prelf_Net_MWh').alias('sum_prelf_Net_MWh'),
                                            sum('postlf_Net_MWh').alias('sum_postlf_Net_MWh'),
                                            sum('prelf_kW').alias('sum_prelf_kW'),
                                            sum('postlf_kW').alias('sum_postlf_kW'),
                                            sum('prelf_kVAR').alias('sum_prelf_kVAR'),
                                            sum('postlf_kVAR').alias('sum_postlf_kVAR'),
                                            sum('prelf_kVA').alias('sum_prelf_kVA'),
                                            sum('postlf_kVA').alias('sum_postlf_kVA'),
                                            sum('prelf_Power_Factor').alias('sum_prelf_Power_Factor'),
                                            sum('postlf_Power_Factor').alias('sum_postlf_Power_Factor')

# Replace NULL values in usage
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_fianl_E_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_fianl_E_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_fianl_B_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_fianl_B_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_fianl_K_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_fianl_K_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_fianl_Q_sum':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_fianl_Q_sum':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_kW':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_kW':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_kW':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_kW':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_kVAR':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_kVAR':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_kVAR':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_kVAR':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_kVA':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_kVA':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_kVA':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_kVA':0})

df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor':0})

# Children with negative usage is set to Zero
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh")))

df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh")))

df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_kW",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kW") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kW")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_kW",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kW") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kW")))

df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_kVAR",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kVAR") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kVAR")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_kVAR",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kVAR") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kVAR")))

df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_kVA",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kVA") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_kVA")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_kVA",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kVA") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_kVA")))

df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor",when(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor",when(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor")))

# Parent NMI remaining usage =  Parent NMI total usage - sum of child NMI usage
df_billable_usage = df_usage.withColumn("E",col('parentusage_fianl_E_sum')-col('childusage_fianl_E_sum'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("B",col('parentusage_fianl_B_sum')-col('childusage_fianl_B_sum'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("K",col('parentusage_fianl_K_sum')-col('childusage_fianl_K_sum'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("Q",col('parentusage_fianl_Q_sum')-col('childusage_fianl_Q_sum'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_Net_kWh",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_Net_kWh'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_Net_kWh",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_Net_kWh'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_Net_MWh",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_Net_MWh'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_Net_MWh",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_Net_MWh'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_kW",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_kW')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_kW'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_kW",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_kW')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_kW'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_kVAR",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_kVAR')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_kVAR'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_kVAR",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_kVAR')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_kVAR'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_kVA",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_kVA')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_kVA'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_kVA",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_kVA')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_kVA'))

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPreLF_Power_Factor",col('parentusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor')-col('childusage_sum_prelf_Power_Factor'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BUPostLF_Power_Factor",col('parentusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor')-col('childusage_sum_postlf_Power_Factor'))

# Add columns
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn(
    'BUPreLF_Power_Factor_per', 
    concat(round(col('BUPreLF_Power_Factor') * 100, 2).cast('string'), lit('%'))
)

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn(
    'BUPostLF_Power_Factor_per', 
    concat(round(col('BUPostLF_Power_Factor') * 100, 2).cast('string'), lit('%'))
)

df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||","NMI"),256))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn('LoadDate', to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))

df_gold_final = df_billable_usage.select('NMI','NMIHashId','Timestamp','DateHashId','DisplayTimestamp_d','TimeHashId','Period','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                        'LoadDate','DLFCode','DLFValue','TLFCode','TLFValue','Status','E','B','K','Q','BUPreLF_Net_kWh','BUPostLF_Net_kWh',
                                        'BUPreLF_Net_MWh','BUPostLF_Net_MWh','BUPreLF_kW','BUPostLF_kW','BUPreLF_kVAR','BUPostLF_kVAR','BUPreLF_kVA','BUPostLF_kVA',                           
                                        'BUPreLF_Power_Factor','BUPostLF_Power_Factor','BUPreLF_Power_Factor_per','BUPostLF_Power_Factor_per'

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

#order columns for Azure Synapse insert should match synapse table creation order.
df_gold=df_gold.select(*column_order)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
# Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
(df_gold.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode("overwrite")
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{db_tablename}"""))
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
#Row calculation
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_TotalRows,0,0,Gold_TotalRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
